name: Potato Pancakes or Latkes
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Russet potatoes (white will do in a pinch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the potatoes into a large bowl.
2. Add cold water to the bowl and let the potatoes soak for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain the potatoes in a colander.
4. Refill the bowl with cold, salted water (do not add too much; use less salt if you are sodium-restricted) and soak again for 5-10 minutes.
5. Drain the potatoes once more in a colander.
6. Add the diced onion, eggs, flour, salt, and pepper to the potatoes; mix well.
7. Heat about 1/4 inch of oil in a large skillet or electric frying pan until it reaches around 350°F.
8. Spoon about half a cup of potato mixture into the hot oil, spreading it out with the back of a pancake turner.
9. Cook until brown on the bottom (3-4 minutes); flip and cook until golden brown.
10. Drain on paper towels.
11. Enjoy!
